# Raine Pretorius

> Raine Pretorius is a Solutions Architect at Untamed Technologies and Managing Director & Founder of LocknAlert, based in Johannesburg, South Africa. He is a software engineer, smart home systems architect, and tech entrepreneur.

## Current Positions

- Solutions Architect at [Untamed Technologies](https://untamedtech.co.za) since June 2025 — smart home system design, IoT integration, and technical strategy
- Managing Director & Founder at [LocknAlert](https://locknalert.co.za) since August 2025 — smart security platform for homes and businesses

## About

- [About Raine Pretorius](https://raine.pretoriusse.net/about-me/): Full biography, background, current roles, and personal story

## Skills

- [Solutions Architecture](https://raine.pretoriusse.net/my-skills/solutions-architecture/): Smart home system design, IoT device integration, Home Assistant, Z-Wave, Zigbee, Matter
- [Web Development](https://raine.pretoriusse.net/my-skills/web-development/): Blazor, Angular, ASP.NET Core full-stack applications
- [C# & ASP.NET](https://raine.pretoriusse.net/my-skills/asp-dot-net/): Enterprise-grade backends, REST APIs, Entity Framework, Blazor
- [Python](https://raine.pretoriusse.net/my-skills/python/): Scripting, automation, data processing, backend services
- [Databases & SQL](https://raine.pretoriusse.net/my-skills/databases/): Database design, SQL queries, analytics, data extraction
- [Java](https://raine.pretoriusse.net/my-skills/java/): Standalone and enterprise applications
- [Web Design](https://raine.pretoriusse.net/my-skills/web-design/): Responsive, pixel-perfect UI/UX design
- [Excel & VBA](https://raine.pretoriusse.net/my-skills/excel-macros-and-vba/): Macro automation, custom VBA tools, workflow automation
- [Data Visualization](https://raine.pretoriusse.net/my-skills/microsoft-excel-data-visualization-charts-graphs/): Excel charts, dashboards, and graphs
- [Sound Engineering](https://raine.pretoriusse.net/my-skills/digico-certified-sound-engineer/): Digico SD5 certified, live sound mixing, broadcast production

- [Sound Engineering](https://raine.pretoriusse.net/hobbies/sound-engineering/): Digico SD5 certified live sound engineer
